name: mert-studio-code
description: DORUK Programlama Dili - Mert Studio Code IDE
author: Mert

scripts.pack: node node_modules/@electron/packager/bin/electron-packager.mjs . "Mert Studio Code" --platform=win32 --arch=x64 --out=dist --overwrite --electron-version=28.3.3 --ignore="/dist" --ignore="/.git" --ignore="/node_modules/.cache" --asar=false --app-version=1.0.0 && node -e "const fs=require('fs'),path=require('path');const s=path.join(__dirname,'../doruk/doruk.exe'),d=path.join(__dirname,'dist/Mert Studio Code-win32-x64/doruk.exe');if(fs.existsSync(s)){fs.copyFileSync(s,d);console.log('[pack] doruk.exe dist klasörüne kopyalandı');}else{console.warn('[pack] UYARI: doruk.exe bulunamadı →',s);}"
